text: How did Mrs. Sterling get her bag back?
zh: 斯特林太太是怎么把包找回来的?

text: Mrs. Anne Sterling did not think of the risk
zh: 安妮·斯特林太太当时没有想到危险,

text: she was taking when she ran through a forest after two men.
zh: 她就那样穿过树林去追那两个男人。

text: They had rushed up to her while she was having a picnic at the edge of a forest
zh: 当时她正带着孩子们在树林边野餐,那两个人突然冲过来,

text: with her children and tried to steal her handbag.
In the struggle, the strap broke and,
with the bag in their possession,
both men started running through the trees.
zh: 两个男人拔腿就往树林里跑。

text: Mrs. Sterling got so angry that she ran after them.
zh: 斯特林太太气坏了,追了上去。

text: She was soon out of breath,
zh: 没多久她就上气不接下气,

text: When she caught up with them,
she saw that they had sat down and were going through the contents of the bag,
zh: 看见他们正坐下来翻看包里的东西,

text: so she ran straight at them.
zh: 于是她径直朝他们冲了过去。

text: The men got such a fright that they dropped the bag and ran away.
zh: 两个男人吓了一大跳,扔下包就跑了。

text: 'The strap needs mending,' said Mrs. Sterling later, 'but they did not steal anything.'
zh: 斯特林太太后来说:“背带需要修一下,不过他们什么都没偷走。”
